inputDomain: RationalExpr over Q with explicit divisions; transcendentals rejected
outputRelation: lhs = rhs under explicit nonzero denomFactors (Claim.proposition)
termination: Finite expression size; polynomial normalization terminates on sparse terms
complexityAssumptions: Expression node count bounded by capability limits
Integer digit length bounded by capability limits
representationRefinement: RationalExpr IR → sparse Poly → kernel-checked equality
performanceNotes: Correctness is independent of backend speed.
Reference path is checker-side polyEqual + denom cover, not a CAS rewrite engine.
knownLimitations: Does not claim completeness over all rational identities.
Does not verify Mathematica or SymPy internals.
